quick_skim.title: Probabilistic Memory for Trustworthy Edge Intelligence
quick_skim.abstract: Probabilistic computation plays an important role in trustworthy edge intelligence to quantify uncertainty, enhance robustness, reconstruct data, and protect privacy, but its adoption is limited by the orders-of-magnitude data throughput gap between Gaussian random number generation (GRNG) and computation, as well as instruction overhead. This paper introduces probabilistic memory (p-MEM), a unified memory primitive that stores distribution parameters, such as mean and standard deviation, and samples directly at the native memory bandwidth, where deterministic data becomes the zero-variance special case. Using a layout-validated p-MEM simulator, we comprehensively explore device choices, memory specifications, and technology nodes, showing that p-MEM can achieve more than 1000 GSa/s/mm^2 GRNG throughput, including memory-array access. Integrated into CPU/GPU systems, p-MEM reduces instruction count by up to 2.19x/4.37x, sampling latency by 562x/3.45x, and energy by 295.5x/3.53x for Bayesian neural network workloads, providing a scalable hardware substrate for trustworthy probabilistic AI.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: probabilistic memory unifies storage and computation enabling in-memory sampling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 概率内存统一存储与计算，实现存内采样
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 概率内存统一存储与计算，实现存内采样
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 概率内存统一存储与计算，实现存内采样
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Probabilistic Memory (p-MEM) stores distribution parameters and samples at memory bandwidth, closing the data throughput gap for trustworthy edge intelligence, achieving over 10x speedup and energy reduction over GPU-based GRNG.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 概率计算在可信边缘智能中至关重要，但受限于高斯随机数生成与计算之间的数据吞吐量差距。本文提出概率内存（p-MEM），一种统一内存原语，直接存储均值与标准差等分布参数，并以本地内存带宽采样，将确定性数据视为零方差特例。通过布局验证的模拟器探索器件、规格和工艺节点，p-MEM相比基于GPU的GRNG可实现一个数量级以上的速度提升和能耗降低。这项技术为边缘设备上的高效概率推理提供了硬件基础，可间接支持存内计算架构。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 概率计算在可信边缘智能中至关重要，但受限于高斯随机数生成与计算之间的数据吞吐量差距。本文提出概率内存（p-MEM），一种统一内存原语，直接存储均值与标准差等分布参数，并以本地内存带宽采样，将确定性数据视为零方差特例。通过布局验证的模拟器探索器件、规格和工艺节点，p-MEM相比基于GPU的GRNG可实现一个数量级以上的速度提升和能耗降低。这项技术为边缘设备上的高效概率推理提供了硬件基础，可间接支持存内计算架构。
